welcome.title: Window of Tolerance
welcome.subtitle:
Understand your nervous system.
Find your way back to calm.
welcome.description: This gentle activity will help you understand where your nervous system is right now — and give you tools to find balance. Go at your own pace. You are safe here.
welcome.callout: ✨ Take a breath. You're in the right place.
welcome.disclaimer: This activity is a supportive tool, not a replacement for professional therapy.

explain.title: Your Nervous System Has a Window

safe.label: Safe Zone
safe.desc: Calm, present, able to think clearly.

explain.footer: Trauma can push you out of your window. This helps you recognize where you are and get back inside.

checkin.title: Where Are You Right Now?
checkin.subtitle: Take a breath. Then honestly select where you are right now.
checkin.footer: There is no wrong answer. This is simply your starting point.

hyper.label: Above My Window
hyper.desc: I feel anxious, panicked, angry, or overwhelmed.

safe.label: Inside My Window
safe.desc: I feel calm, present, and grounded.

hypo.label: Below My Window
hypo.desc: I feel numb, foggy, or disconnected.

hyper.title: Above Your Window
hyper.subtitle: Your nervous system is in overdrive. That is okay. Let's bring you back gently.

tools.name: Box Breathing
tools.desc: Inhale 4, hold 4, exhale 4, hold 4. Repeat 4 times.

tools.name: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding
tools.desc: 5 things see, 4 touch, 3 hear, 2 smell, 1 taste.

tools.name: Feet on Floor
tools.desc: Press feet down, say: 'I am here. I am safe. This will pass.'

hyper.footer: You are safe. Take your time.

hypo.title: Below Your Window
hypo.subtitle: Your nervous system has gone quiet. It's protecting you. Let's gently wake it back up.

tools.name: Gentle Movement
tools.desc: Stand, walk slowly, swing arms. Let your body wake up.

tools.name: Rhythmic Sound
tools.desc: Play music with steady beat, tap feet along.

tools.name: Speak Out Loud
tools.desc: Say your name, location, today's date aloud. Re-engage thinking brain.

hypo.button: I Feel a Little More Present →
hypo.footer: You are doing great. Take it step by step.

safe.title: Inside Your Window
safe.subtitle: You are in your safe zone. This is where healing, connection, and growth happen. Well done.

tools.name: Keep Breathing Slowly
tools.desc: In through nose, out through mouth.

tools.name: Reflect
tools.desc: What helped you stay here? Write it down.

tools.name: Self-Compassion
tools.desc: 'My nervous system was doing its job. I'm not broken. I'm healing.'

safe.footer: You are worthy of care and healing.

toolkit.title: 🧰 Your Personal Toolkit
toolkit.subtitle: Your go-to tools — saved and ready whenever you need them.
toolkit.journal_desc: What was one moment today when you noticed your nervous system shifting — and what did you do about it?
toolkit.footer: Your journey matters. Come back whenever you need support.

complete.title: Check-in Complete
complete.message: You've successfully mapped your current state. Building awareness is the first step toward finding your balance.

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.

common.instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath
